posting.sourceTitle: Eastern Millwright Regional Council Apprenticeship & Training Fund
posting.sponsorName: Eastern Millwright Regional Council Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee
posting.locationSummary: Capital District, Central, Finger Lakes, Mohawk Valley, North Country, Southern Tier, and Western regions of New York State
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at local1163.com any day and any time during the recruitment period. Use the Join Us tab, and make sure your application is received by August 3, 2026.
posting.applicationHours: Any day, any time during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old; proof required at enrollment or bona fide offer of employment.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of Eastern Millwright Regional Council, which includes all New York State counties except Dutchess, Nassau, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Suffolk, Westchester, Kings, Queens, Bronx, New York, and Richmond.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various jobsites and required classes at the approved school, and must have a valid driver’s license. Apprentice may be required to operate company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test after selection and prior to enrollment. Drug testing may be administered at any time during the program, and the sponsor pays for the test.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend all related instruction classroom training as required to complete the apprenticeship program.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old; proof will be required at time of enrollment or bona fide offer of employment.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship. Drug testing may be administered at any time during the program.

Must sign an affidavit indicating they are physically able to perform Millwright work, including climbing and working from heights, on scaffolds, in confined spaces and underground; lifting a minimum of 50 pounds; performing repetitive motions; using precision tools; working in inclement weather; and standing and stooping for prolonged periods of time.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various jobsites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have a valid driver’s license. Apprentice may be required to operate company vehicles.
Must be a U.S. citizen or legally able to work in the USA.
Must attend all related instruction classroom training as required to complete the apprenticeship program.

Must reside within the jurisdiction of Eastern Millwright Regional Council, which includes all counties in New York State except Dutchess, Nassau, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Suffolk, Westchester, Kings, Queens, Bronx, New York, and Richmond.
Must provide a copy of DD-214, if applicable, at time of enrollment or bona fide offer of employment.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, live within the council’s jurisdiction, have reliable transportation and a valid driver’s license, be legally eligible to work in the U.S., pass a drug test, and attend required classroom instruction.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Eastern Millwright Regional Council at (315) 277-7808 for further information.
